description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository and defines three stages: build, test, and deploy, with MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables. In the build stage add a validate:jdk7 job using the maven:3.3.9-jdk-7 image that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test-compile`, and a validate:jdk8 job using the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 image that runs the same command. In the test stage add a verify:jdk7 job (image maven:3.3.9-jdk-7) and a verify:jdk8 job (image maven:3.3.9-jdk-8) both executing `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify site site:stage` and configured to run on all branches except master. Also in the test stage add a deploy:jdk8 job (image maven:3.3.9-jdk-8) that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy site site:stage`, runs only on the master branch, and stores the target/staging directory as an artifact. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job (image busybox:latest) that depends on deploy:jdk8, runs `mv target/staging public`, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and also runs only on master.
